markdownRemark.excerpt: If you get this error, you may have run another PSake script with a different framework version in the same PowerShell session. Open a new PowerShell window and…
markdownRemark.html:
If you get this error, you may have run another PSake script with a different framework version in the same PowerShell session.

Open a new PowerShell window and try again.

frontmatter.title: PSake: "Exception: Unknown .NET Framework version, 4.6.1 specified in 4.6.1."
Rewriting git history - removing a directory
